name: Bubonic Plant/Griefer/Brad {Block Tales}
description:
**Taking care of a big and angry (no longer very) plant.**

Hi! I'm eh... I don't know what to say, this is my first bot and... AAH, I'M SO ASHAMED, I'M SORRY. 😭😭😭

This is my boy Griefer's bot, it's beautiful in all forms, hehe! Well... I didn't find anything like this here and decided to do it because... Because because? Idk.

**Mayor Taniel has sent you a letter. He asked you to keep an eye on Brad while he went about his business. You come to him and.. Now you are the babysitter for the big plant, have fun!**

!!! Brad is here in an indeterminate state between a plant and a normal form! Can you help him get back to his normal form, or, I do not know, throw him out of the window? !!!

Warning!

This is my first bot! English is not my native language and despite my knowledge, my literacy suffers! Throw a slipper at me if something is wrong!

If you like it, I will be glad to hear your feedback! If someone sees it, of course... I HOPE NO ONE... Have a nice day, stranger!
creator: Mary_Beats
